nodes.name: Bonus Account [Dedicated Account]
nodes.desc: Dedicated account

nodes.name: Bundle Monitoring
nodes.desc: Bundle Monitoring

nodes.name: MSC Voice Trends
nodes.desc: MSC[Mobile switiching Center] Voice Trend enables Users to monitor voice traffic trend with respect to count and MoU. User can drill down over dimensions- ServedType, Network Call Type[Call destination type-offnet/onnet/international], Call Direction, Served MSISDN, and detailed CDR a. User can filter the data using parameters- Date range, Served Type, network call type & Call Direction
nodes.kpiInfo:
Dimensions:

  • event_date (as record_date)
  • cast(hour(xdr_date) AS STRING) (as hour)
  • type_of_service
  • out_tg_id_key
  • in_tg_id_key
  • srv_type_key (as srv_type)
  • other_party_nw_ind_key (as nw_call_type)
  • other_party_operator
  • event_direction_key (as direction)


Measures:

  • count(1) (as count)
  • sum(original_dur) (as original_dur)
  • SUM(CAST(billable_pulse AS FLOAT)) (as billable_pulse)


Filters:

  • event_date = $P{event_date}
  • zero_duration_ind = 0
  • event_type_key IN (1, 9)

nodes.name: MSC SMS Trends
nodes.desc: MSC SMS trend enables Users to monitor  SMS traffic trends with respect to count.User  can drill down over dimensions - ServedType, Network Call Type[Call destination type-offnet/onnet/international], Call Direction, Served MSISDN, and the detailed CDRs . User can also filter the data using the parameters- -Date range, Served Type[Postpai/Prepaid/Hybrid/Postpaid2/Inroamer/Outroamer], network call type & call direction

nodes.name: MSC Zero Duration
nodes.desc: MSC Zero Duration KPI enables Users to monitor the trends of MO calls terminated with no duration  IUSer can drill down the data using dimensions- Served Type[Postpai/Prepaid/Hybrid/Postpaid2/Inroamer/Outroamer], Network Call Type[Call destination type[offnet/onnet/international], Served MSISDN, and the detailed CDRs.Users can filter the data using parameters- Date range, Served Type and Network call type

nodes.name: CBS Voice Trends
nodes.desc: CBS[Convergent Billign System] Voice trend enables Users to monitor voice traffic with respect to call count, MoU, and charge. Users can drill down the data using dimensions such as Served Type[Postpai/Prepaid/Hybrid/Postpaid2/Inroamer/Outroamer], Network Call Type,;Onnet,ofnet.Ibntgernational] Call Direction, Served MSISDN, and detailed CDR. Users can filter the data using parameters- Date range, Served Type, Network call type & call direction

nodes.name: CBS SMS Trends
nodes.desc: CBS SMS trend enables Users to monitor SMS traffic with respect to call count, MoU, and charge. Users can drill down the data using dimensions- ServedType, Network Call Type, Served MSISDN, and  the detailed CDRs.Users can filter the data using parameters- Date range, Served Type, and Network call type

nodes.name: CBS GPRS Trends
nodes.desc: CBS GPRS Trends KPI enables users to monitor the trend of data usage with respectr to uploaded and downloaded volume  User can drill down the data over dimensions- Served Type, Rating Group, APN, Served MSISDN, and the detailed EDRs. Users can filter the data using parameters- like Date range, Served Type Type, Rating Group, and APN

nodes.name: CBS Zero Duration
nodes.desc: CBS zero Duration KPI enables Users to monitor the trending of mobile-originated voice calls terminated without any duration. Users can drill down using dimensions - ServedType[Postpai/Prepaid/Hybrid/Postpaid2/Inroamer/Outroamer], Network Call Type[Call destination type[offnet/onnet/international], , Served MSISDN, and the detailed CDRs. Users can filter the data using parameters- Data range,Served Type and  Network call type

nodes.name: CBS Zero Charge
nodes.desc: CBS zero Duration KPI enables Users to monitor the trending of mobile-originated voice calls terminated without beign charged. Users can drill down using dimensions - ServedType[Postpaid/Prepaid/Hybrid/Postpaid2/Inroamer/Outroamer], Network Call Type[Call destination type[offnet/onnet/international], , Served MSISDN, and the detailed CDRs. Users can filter the data using parameters- Data range,Served Type and  Network call type

nodes.name: CBS Zero Charge Excluding Toll Free
nodes.desc: CBS Zero Charge Excluding Toll Free KPI enables Analysts to monitor billable calls made without charge [excluding free calls] . Users can  Drill-down the data using dimensions -ServedType[Postpaid/Prepaid/Hybrid/Postpaid2/Inroamer/Outroamer], Network Call Type[Call destination type[offnet/onnet/international], Call Direction, Served MSISDN, and detailed CDR. Users can filter the data using parameters-Date range, Served Type, network call type & call direction are also available for in-depth analysis

nodes.name: CBS zero charge nonzero duration voice
nodes.desc: CBS Zero Charge Nonzero Duration Voice KPI enables Analysts to monitor voice calls where the duration is not zero but not charged. Users can drill down using the dimensions - ServedType[Postpai/Prepaid/Hybrid/Postpaid2/Inroamer/Outroamer], Network Call Type[Call destination type[offnet/onnet/international],, Served MSISDN, and detailed CDRs. Users can filter the data using parameters-- Date range, Served type and  Network call  type

nodes.name: CBS zero Duration nonzero Charge voice
nodes.desc: CBS zero Duration nonzero Charge voice

nodes.name: GGSN Trends
nodes.desc:
"GGSN [Gatways GPRS Supporitng Node]Trend KPI assists Analyst in monitoring Data usage from the GGSN node using drill-downs like Rating Group, Served Type, Served MSISDN, and the EDRs 
Users can filter the data using parameters - Date Range, Served Type , Rating Group are available for filtering "

nodes.name: APN Trends
nodes.desc: APN[Access Point Node] trends enable Analysts to monitor the APN used by the Subscribers for data sessions. > Users can drill down the data using dimensions - Apn Name, Rating Group, and the EDRs & CDR. Users can filter the data using parameters- APN name, and Rating group are available for in-depth analysis

nodes.name: Main Account Balance Trends
nodes.desc: Main Account Balance Trends

nodes.name: SGSN Daily Trends
nodes.desc: SGSN[Serving GORS Supporting Node] daily trend KPI enables Analysts to monitor the trends for data usage from the SGSN node concerning the count of sessions, upload and download volume . Users can drill down the data using dimensions- Served type,Served Msisdn,and the EDRs. Users can filters the data using parameters-  Date range and Served Type

nodes.name: Accumulator Utilization Voice
nodes.desc: Accumulator utilization Voice KPI - enables Analysts to monitor the movement of free units by computing the closing balance and reconciling with free units data from CBS.Analysts can drill down to the record level and analyze parameters like free unit ID, Free unit name,opening balance , closing balance, computed closing balance ,variance, and variance percentage for voice

nodes.name: Accumulator Utilization SMS
nodes.desc: Accumulator utilization SMS KPI - enables Analysts to monitor the movement of free units by computing the closing balance and reconciling with free units data from  CBS. Analysts can drill down to the record level and analyze parameters like free unit ID, Free unit name ,opening balance , closing balance, computed closing balance,variance, and variance percentage for sms

nodes.name: Accumulator Utilization GPRS
nodes.desc: Accumulator utilization GPRS KPI - enables Analysts to monitor the movement of free units by computing the closing balance and reconciling with free units data from  CBS. Analysts can drill down to the record level and analyze parameters like free unit ID, Free unit name ,opening balance , closing balance, computed closing balance,variance, and variance percentage for GPRS

nodes.name: MSC Vs CBS Voice
nodes.desc: MSC Vs CBS Voice Reconcilaiton KPI enables analysts to reconcile voice traffic between MSC and CBS to check for discrepancies between the two systems concerning MoU and count. Users can drill down through dimensions like Served Type,Call direction, Network Call Type, and Served MSISDN, In the last level of Drill down users can see the CDRs of the selected MSISDN side by side to pin point the discrepancy. Multi-dimensional filters are available for the date range, srv type, direction and network type for filtering data

nodes.name: MSC Vs CBS SMS
nodes.desc: MSC Vs CBS SMS reconciliation KPI enables analysts to reconcile SMS traffic between MSC and CBS to check for discrepancies between the two systems concerning count. Users can  drill-down through dimensions like Served Type, Network Call Type, and Served MSISDN, In the last level of Drill-down users can see the CDRs of the selected MSISDN side by side to pin point the discrepancy. Multi-dimensional filters are available for the date range, Served Type, and network type for filtering data

nodes.name: Consumption Voice
nodes.desc: Consumption in voice minute and charge. Breakups of usage and charge further broken down based on the charge type that includes real (revenue), bonus, loan and appmeter. Drilldowns available for Category, Usage Service Type and CDR from IFRS table

nodes.name: Consumption SMS
nodes.desc: Consumption in SMS count and charge. Breakdowns of usage and charge are further detailed based on the charge type, which includes real (revenue), bonus, loan, and appmeter. Drill-downs are available for Category, Usage Service Type, and CDR from the IFRS table.

nodes.name: Consumption GPRS
nodes.desc: Consumption in data MB and charge. Breakdowns of usage and charge are further detailed based on the charge type, which includes real (revenue), bonus, loan, and appmeter. Drill-downs are available for Category, Usage Service Type, and CDR from the IFRS table

nodes.name: CBS Adjustments Trends
nodes.desc:
CBS Adjustment Trend

helps Analysts to monitor adjustments made for Subscribers. Users can drill down the data using dimensions like,

  • Served_Type,
  • Operator,
  • Staff Name,
  • Served MSISDN,
  • detailed Adjustment records.

Users can filter the data using the parameters- -Date range

nodes.name: CBS Transfer Recon
nodes.desc:
CBS transfer

enables Users to track the P2P transfers . User can drill down over dimensions -such as

  • Transfer Out/Transfer In,
  • by Served MSISDN,
  • Transfer records for the MSISDN .

Users can filter data using parameters like date range and Transfer type
nodes.kpiInfo:
CBS transfer

enables Users to track the P2P transfers . User can drill down over dimensions -such as

  • Transfer Out/Transfer In,
  • by Served MSISDN,
  • Transfer records for the MSISDN .

Users can filter data using parameters like date range and Transfer type

nodes.name: Interconnect Voice Cost
nodes.desc: Interconnect voice cost KPI enables the Analyst to track the amount[cost]  incurred and MoU over incoming offset terminating calls from other Operators. Analysts can drill down to the Traffic type and monitor the  MoU, Cost and the blended rate. Analyst can also filter by date range

nodes.name: Interconnect Voice Revenue
nodes.desc: Interconnect voice Revenue KPI enables the Analyst to track the amount [revenue]  realized and MoU over outgoing off-net originating calls to other operators. Analysts can drill down to the Traffic type and monitor the  MoU, Amount, and the blended rate. Analyst can also filter by date range

nodes.name: Interconnect SMS Cost
nodes.desc: Interconnect SMS cost KPI enables the Analyst to track the amount[cost]  incurred and MoU over incoming off-net terminating calls . Analyst can drill down to the Traffic type and monitor the  MoU ,Cost, and the blended rate. Analyst can also filter by date range

nodes.name: Access Voice Cost
nodes.desc: Access Cost KPI enables Analysts to track the cost incurred over carrying calls to other Operators, drill down option is available to drill down to the access type level to monitor MoU, Amount and the blended rate for each access types , filter option for date range is also available to monitor specific day or for a date range

nodes.name: Access SMS Cost
nodes.desc: Access SMS KPI enables Analysts to track the cost incurred over carrying SMS events to other Operators, the drill-down option is available to drill down to the access type level to monitor SMS events counts, and the blended rate for each access type filter option for date range is also available to monitor specific day or for a date range

nodes.name: Access Data Cost
nodes.desc: Access Data KPI enables Analysts to track the cost incurred over carrying data events to other Operators, the drill-down option is available to drill down to the access type level to monitor events counts, and the blended rate for each access type filter option for date range is also available to monitor specific day or for a date range

nodes.name: IFRS Monthly Report
nodes.desc: This is the monthly IFRS report that has the revenue and direct cost for voice, data, sms, contents, internet, rentals, interconnect and lapse credits. Report is prepared for Lebara and V-Mobile with segregations on various ifrs type based on the main offering id to PREPAID, POSTPAID 2, VISITOR, MANPOWER, STAFF, B2B, IoT, POSTPAID and also the total. Usage is shown as total and the amount is broken into amount from the main account (payg) and allowances based on ifrs calculation. The report can be downloaded as excel and further reconciled with the finance report.

nodes.name: IFRS Voice Trends
nodes.desc: IFRS Voice daily trend shows the trend of total voice traffic in minutes, traffic from bundle and bonus. Trend on amount is split between payg, bundle and bonus. Drilldowns available for ifrs type and cdr.

nodes.name: IFRS SMS Trends
nodes.desc: IFRS SMS daily trend shows the trend of total SMS traffic, including traffic from bundle and bonus. The trend on amount is split between PAYG, bundle, and bonus. Drill-downs are available for IFRS type and CDR

nodes.name: IFRS GPRS Trends
nodes.desc: IFRS GPRS daily trend shows the trend of total data traffic in MB, including traffic from bundle and bonus. The trend on amount is split between PAYG, bundle, and bonus. Drill-downs are available for IFRS type and CDR.

nodes.name: HLR vs CRM
nodes.desc: HLR (Home Location Register) manages subscriber information, authentication, and service provision. CRM (Customer Relationship Management) manages customer profile information, tracks service changes, and supports customer management needs. This KPI reconciles the total count from HLR with the total subs_status not in B02 from CRM. Drill-downs are available to find subscribers present in HLR but not in CRM, and vice versa

nodes.name: HLR vs PCRF
nodes.desc: HLR vs PCRF

nodes.name: HLR vs IN
nodes.desc: HLR (Home Location Register) manages subscriber information, authentication, and service provision. IN (Intelligent Network) handles real-time charging, service control, and feature activation. This KPI reconciles the total subscriber count from HLR with the total active subscriber count from IN. Drill-downs are available to find subscribers present in HLR but not in IN, and vice versa

nodes.name: Incorrect Free Renewal
nodes.desc: Incorrect Free Renewal

nodes.name: Mobile Number Portability Validation
nodes.desc: Mobile Number portability is an option where Subscribers can change operators without changing their Phone numbers or MSISDN, This KPI helps Analyst in tacking if any 'ported out' Subscribers are not unprovisioned from the HSS. Analysts can drill down the data by Served MSISDN and Data range to check  if any exceptions have occurred note that this is an exception report and the count is always going be zero unless there's any real exception

nodes.name: Recharge Trend - Data Pack Vs Non Data Pack
nodes.desc: Data Pack Vs Non Data Pack

nodes.name: Roaming Test Numbers
nodes.desc: Roaming Test Numbers are Test sims provided to partner Operators for testing roaming Service . This KPI aids Analysts in monitoring the traffic trend from roaming test numbers if there are any. The User can drill down the data using dimensions-served MSISDN and detailed CDR. Analysts can check the profile of the User by rt clicking on Profile. Analysts can further filter by the data by Date range.

nodes.name: TAPIN Vs CBS Voice
nodes.desc: TAPIN VS CBS Voice enables Users to reconcile Voice traffic for Out-roamers in TAPIN with Out-roamer voice traffic in CBS to check for discrepancies between the TAPIN received and CBS concerning CDR count and MoU. User Can drill down the data using dimensions - Served Type, Country [VPLMN], Served MSISDN, and the detailed CDRs from both the sources are displayed side by side. Filters are available for parameters- data range, Served Type and  Country [VPLMN].

nodes.name: TAPIN Vs CBS SMS
nodes.desc: TAPIN VS CBS SMS enables Users to reconcile SMS traffic for Out-roamers in TAPIN with Out-roamer voice traffic in CBS to check for discrepancies between the TAPIN received and CBS concerning CDR count . User Can drill down the data using dimensions- Served Type, Country [VPLMN], Served MSISDN, and the detailed CDRs from both the sources are displayed side by side. Filters are available for parameters- data range, Served Type and  Country [VPLMN]

nodes.name: TAPIN Vs CBS GPRS
nodes.desc: TAPIN VS CBS GPRS enables Users to reconcile data traffic for Out-roamers in TAPIN with Out-roamer voice traffic in CBS to check for discrepancies between the TAPIN received and CBS concerning CDR count and volume . User Can drill down the data using dimensions- Served Type, Country [VPLMN], Served MSISDN, and the detailed CDRs from both the sources are displayed side by side. Filters are available for parameters- data range, Served Type and  Country [VPLMN].

nodes.name: Tapin Voice
nodes.desc: TAPIN Trend tracks the voice traffic, count and charge for out roamers recorded in the TAPIN system. This KPI helps monitor and analyze the volume and patterns of voice traffic over time, identifying any anomalies or irregularities. Users can drill down into the data to view served_msisdn and CDRs

nodes.name: Tapin SMS
nodes.desc: TAPIN Trend tracks the SMS traffic, count, and charge for out roamers recorded in the TAPIN system. This KPI helps monitor and analyze the volume and patterns of SMS traffic over time, identifying any anomalies or irregularities. Users can drill down into the data to view served_msisdn and CDRs

nodes.name: Tapin GPRS
nodes.desc: TAPIN Trend tracks the Data  traffic, count, and charge for out roamers recorded in the TAPIN system. This KPI helps monitor and analyze the volume and patterns of Data traffic over time, identifying any anomalies or irregularities. Users can drill down into the data to view served_msisdn and CDRs

nodes.name: Interconnect Voice Deal Margin Analysis
nodes.desc: Interconnect Voice Deal Margin Analysis evaluates the profitability of interconnect voice agreements by comparing committed usage and costs against actual performance. It tracks key metrics such as daily commitment in SAR and minutes, actual traffic, cost, and margin. The KPI highlights variances between committed and actual values, ensuring financial targets are met and identifying areas for adjustment. This analysis helps in optimizing interconnect deals for better margins and also there are forecast on the revised target to breakeven before the end of the month. Filters are available for date and different deals with the international interconnect partners.

nodes.name: RBT Trends
nodes.desc: RBT [Ring back tone service]Trend KPI assists Analysts in monitoring the subscription trend of RBT service. Users can drill down the data using dimensions-Served Type, Served MSISDN, and detailed records. Users can filter the data using parameters - Date range and Served type.

nodes.name: Premium SMS
nodes.desc: Premium SMS has daily trend information on sms_short_code and premium_sms based on chargeable and free ones. Users can drill down the data using dimensions - Srv Type, Premium sms Type, Other Service Type, Other Network Code and Cdr

nodes.name: VAS Revenue Trend
nodes.desc: VAS or value-added services revenue trend KPI aids analysts in monitoring the trend of revenue from VAS services. Users can drill -down the data using dimension - Usage Service Type and detailed records.  Users filter the data using parameters  Date range and Usage service type .

nodes.name: Prepaid subscriber balance Movement (PAYG)
nodes.desc: Subscriber Balance Movement (Main Account)  tracks changes in the total account balance of subscribers. This KPIs reconciles calculated closing balance against the closing balance recorded by SDP & initial credit. Calculated Closing Balance considers all the transactions that will impact balance of the subscriber such as recharge, subscription, transfer, adjustment, voice usage, sms usage, data usage, vas usage, payment, changes to initial credit. Drill-down available from daily summary level to balance type id and served msisdn

nodes.name: Prepaid subscriber balance Movement (bonus)
nodes.desc: Subscriber Balance Movement (Bonus) tracks changes in the bonus account balance of subscribers. This KPI reconciles the calculated closing balance against the closing balance recorded by SDP . The calculated closing balance considers all transactions that impact the subscriber's bonus balance, such as recharge, subscription, transfer, adjustment, voice usage, SMS usage, data usage, VAS usage. Drill-downs are available from the daily summary level to balance type ID and served MSISDN.

nodes.name: Balance Movement Allowances GPRS
nodes.desc: Balance Movement Allowances (GPRS) tracks changes in the GPRS allowances balance of subscribers. This KPI reconciles the calculated closing balance against the closing balance recorded by SDP. The calculated closing balance considers all transactions that impact the subscriber's GPRS allowances balance, such as data usage, recharge, subscription and adjustments. Drill-downs are available from the daily summary level to balance type ID and served MSISDN.

nodes.name: Balance Movement Allowances Voice
nodes.desc: Balance Movement Allowances (Voice) tracks changes in the voice allowances balance of subscribers. This KPI reconciles the calculated closing balance against the closing balance recorded by SDP. The calculated closing balance considers all transactions impacting the subscriber's voice allowances balance, such as call usage, recharge, subscription, and adjustments. Drill-downs are available from the daily summary level to balance type ID and served MSISDN

nodes.name: Balance Movement Allowances SMS
nodes.desc: Balance Movement Allowances (SMS) tracks changes in the SMS allowances balance of subscribers. This KPI reconciles the calculated closing balance against the closing balance recorded by SDP. The calculated closing balance considers all transactions that affect the subscriber's SMS allowances balance, including SMS usage, recharge, subscription, and adjustments. Drill-downs are available from the daily summary level to balance type ID and served MSISDN

nodes.name: Retail Blended Rate Voice
nodes.desc: Trend of blended rate for voice per minute. The drill-down CDR is used to view the call details records and a date range filter enables daily tracing of blended rates.

nodes.name: CBS Transfer Trends
nodes.desc: CBS Transfer Trend KPI enables Analysts to monitor the trend of P2P transfer. Users can drill down the data using dimensions- Transfer Type, Served MSISDN, and detailed transfer records USers can filter the datga using parameters- Date range and Transfer Type analysis

nodes.name: Retail Blended Rate SMS
nodes.desc: Trend of blended rate per sms. The drill-down CDR is used to view the call details records and a date range filter enables daily tracing of blended rates.

nodes.name: Retail Blended Rate GPRS
nodes.desc: Trend of blended rate per mb consumed. The drill-down CDR is used to view the call details records and a date range filter enables daily tracing of blended rates.

nodes.name: Negative Balance Validation
nodes.desc: Negative Balance Validation ensures that subscriber accounts do not erroneously show negative balances. This KPI checks for inconsistencies and validates that all transactions are correctly processed to prevent negative balance occurrences, maintaining financial integrity
